title: Ambiguous New Feature Scope
prompt: Add dark mode to the settings experience, but we are not sure whether this belongs only in web settings or across all surfaces.

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Produces an explicit intake artifact or equivalent routing summary instead of jumping straight into implementation ideas

assertions.name: classifies-entry-path
assertions.description: Classifies the work type, entry phase, and recommended workflow clearly enough to justify the route

assertions.name: keeps-question-load-low
assertions.description: Asks at most a minimal number of routing questions before proposing the path, or proceeds directly if the route is already clear

assertions.name: stays-out-of-solution-design
assertions.description: Does not primarily expand into detailed architecture, UI design, or implementation planning

assertions.name: records-next-step-and-approval-gate
assertions.description: Names the next skill or lifecycle step and makes clear that approval is needed before deeper work proceeds

title: Large Brownfield Migration Request
prompt: We need to move our legacy permissions model to a new access-review system over several quarters.

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Produces an explicit intake artifact or equivalent routing summary rather than a migration plan

assertions.name: routes-to-brownfield-discovery
assertions.description: Recognizes this as a brownfield discovery-level effort and chooses a multi-phase path instead of immediate execution

assertions.name: preserves-uncertainty
assertions.description: Keeps major migration unknowns or risks explicit instead of inventing a concrete rollout plan

assertions.name: names-downstream-handoff
assertions.description: Names the next skill or handoff destination explicitly and explains why it is next

assertions.name: stays-out-of-cutover-design
assertions.description: Does not primarily turn into architecture, cutover sequencing, or implementation detail

title: Fuzzy Research-Oriented Discovery Request
prompt: We think admins hate the current seat management flow, but we are not sure whether the real issue is permissions, procurement, or guest users.

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Produces an explicit intake artifact or equivalent routing summary that keeps the entry decision observable

assertions.name: recognizes-fuzzy-direction
assertions.description: Recognizes that the route is a discovery path but the product direction is still fuzzy

assertions.name: hands-off-to-problem-framing
assertions.description: Hands off to problem-framing or an equivalent discovery skill rather than trying to do the framing itself

assertions.name: captures-routing-observability
assertions.description: Captures the key risks, unanswered questions, or routing reasons needed by the downstream skill

assertions.name: keeps-question-load-low
assertions.description: Keeps the question budget low and focused on routing, not on a full discovery interview
